description_long: This stereo sound system features a compact, cylindrical speaker unit mounted on a short, sturdy base. The front face is dominated by a circular speaker area, likely covered with a fabric or mesh grille, and is bordered by a thin metallic or plastic rim. The body of the speaker is finished in a matte teal color, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface. The rear of the unit shows a subtle seam and a small circular detail, possibly for mounting or as a port. The base is solid and slightly flared, providing stability, and appears to be made of the same material as the main body. No visible control panels, ports, or branding are present on the exterior.
description: A compact, teal cylindrical stereo speaker with a circular front grille and a sturdy, flared base. The design is minimalistic with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular speaker grille and the teal rim, with the base visible below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curved profile of the speaker and the solid, flared base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a seam and a small circular detail on the back of the speaker body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the smooth, continuous surface and base.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille appears as a solid, circular area with a fine, uniform mesh or fabric texture and no visible decorative elements.
